## Summary

Describe the change in 2-5 concise bullets.

## Why this change

Explain why this update is needed.

## Affected paths

List the main files, folders, or note families touched.

## Change type

- [ ] Content correction
- [ ] Publication safety fix
- [ ] Structure / taxonomy improvement
- [ ] Metadata / front matter cleanup
- [ ] Placeholder consistency fix
- [ ] Documentation / policy update
- [ ] Other

## Publication boundary check

- [ ] I did not add real targets, secrets, credentials, or private identifiers
- [ ] I preserved the repository's sanitized public-safe boundary
- [ ] I did not add unsafe step-by-step offensive detail beyond repository scope

## Sanitization check

- [ ] Placeholders are used where needed
- [ ] Placeholder names are consistent
- [ ] I checked for accidental real IPs, domains, usernames, paths, tokens, or IDs

## Structure / taxonomy check

- [ ] Front matter remains valid
- [ ] Naming, taxonomy, and repository structure remain consistent
- [ ] The change is narrowly scoped and reviewable

## Notes for review

Add any context the reviewer should know.
